productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girl's Venice Green Blue Infant Kidswear
description: Compositiontop: Light aqua green and white sleeveless t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with gathered vest back in green and doodle graphics, and broad green bands with light glitter and embroidery on the frontshorts: Blue denim shorts made of cotton fabric, with elasticated waist, two insert pockets on the sides and two pockets on the back, light green stitch detailing, faded patches on the front and frayed edges FittingTop: RegularShorts: Regular Wash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingRemove promptlyLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryBring out the happy urban vibe of your little city girl in this striped green tee and denim shorts combo from gini and jony. The doodle cat and ladybug graphic on the front with the "City girl" lettering all add to the carefree spirit of this tee. Team this with the super comfy denim shorts and crocs footwear for happy, casual outings with your little one, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
